text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Traveling Morioka<n>Festival.
Yukino Bijin invites me to<n>come, and I arrive to
find Gold City<n>and Curren Chan already here.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for com'n, everyone!<n>Let's have
heaps and heaps of fun<n>today!
choice_data_list: Good luck with the taiko drumming.
Good luck with the taiko drumming.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we'll be cheering for you. I<n>gotta say, this
space is much bigger<n>than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, it is pretty big, come to think of<n>it... It looks
like they put in a lot of work<n>to prepare for my big
day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take a deep breath, Yukino. You've<n>put in so
much practice. You'll be fi—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Screeeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh no! The speakers!

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, technical difficulties? Yikes. Aw,<n>man.
Wanna go somewhere else?

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Oh no... All our efforts're gonna<n>go
t'waste!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... And after you work'd so hard,<n>Yukino... It's
all my fault... I'm so<n>sorry!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! We're gonna be<n>A-OK, even if
we don't have a big<n>fancy stage or work'n
speakers.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Both our belov'd Morioka and the<n>sansa odori
are meant to be enjoyed<n>without anyth'n fancy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what I'm sayin' is... you're in<n>good hands!
Leave the rest to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm a bundle of nerves, but...<n>here goes
noth'n!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Da-dum! Da-da-dum! Clack,clack!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sakkora! Choiwa yasse!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Is that the sound of taiko drums?<n>What's this?
Traveling Morioka<n>Festival? Sounds interesting!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, City. I've got a great idea on<n>how to hype
this up further! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Funny you say that. I have an idea as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I-isn't that Gold City and<n>Curren Chan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sakkora choiwa! ☆ Yasse! ♪

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: She's so cuuute! I wanna try!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Join in. You can just copy us as best<n>you can.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(G-Gold City and Curren Chan! And<n>even the
trainer! A-all right... I gotta go<n>even harder!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: O-okay, ev'ryone! Aaalllll togeth'r<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Jinkies! Business was a-boom'n,<n>thanks to you!
Thanks a million!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No thanks nec'ssary! All I did was<n>lose mys'lf in
the taiko drum. You<n>should be thank'n City and
th'others<n>for danc'n.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? Without<n>your
drumming, the whole thing<n>would've be a
non-starter.
choice_data_list: I agree. It's all thanks to your hard work.
I agree. It's all thanks to your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were so cute playing the taiko<n>drums that
everyone just wanted to<n>cheer you on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again. Ev'ryone<n>went along
with you b'cause you<n>never gave up.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
We had a picture perf'ct ending. And<n>it's all
thanks t'you. You worked<n>hard'r than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-you're all too kind!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Ehehe! Thank you all...so much...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, sorry about that! I was bawl'n<n>like a baby
back there! But I'm fine<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, shall we head back?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, I had a close call today.<n>Yet again,
you nearly took my breath<n>away completely.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yet again?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I'm saying you're more incredible<n>than you
give yourself credit for.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Uhhh.. huh? City...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, you three! Hurry up or<n>you'll be left
behind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah! Okay! Coming!
